nasb.text: I will give it into the hands of the foreigners as plunder and to the wicked of the earth as spoil, and they will profane it.

esv.text: And I will give it into the hands of foreigners for prey, and to the wicked of the earth for spoil, and they shall profane it.

cnv.text: 我要把它們交在外族人的手裡作掠物， 給地上的惡人作戰利品，他們必褻瀆這些東西。

ccb.text: 我必使这一切成为外族人手中的猎物，恶人手中的战利品，被任意糟蹋。
